visual_explanation: A visual heuristic detected multiple dark speckles or dirt-like clusters on the bottle surface during PASS verification.
possible_causes: dirt-like clusters on the visible bottle surface
inspection review triggered by dark speckle heuristic
recommended_fix: route this item to operator review
wipe and re-image the surface if safe to do so
inspect nearby items for similar contamination
prevention: improve cleaning and handling before final inspection
stabilize lighting to reduce contamination ambiguity
capture more defect examples for model adaptation
factory_owner_summary: Operator review is required because the PASS verification layer detected multiple dark speckle-like anomalies on the product surface.

annotation_reason: Speckle heuristic found a localized cluster; this is not an exact defect boundary.
report:
VisionGuard inspected 114 product images this shift and detected 40 potential defects, giving a defect rate of 35.1%.

The most common defect type was "crack" and the most common defect category was "surface crack". The highest severity observed was "critical". Average Qwen-VL inference latency was 1317ms per image on AMD MI300X.

The likely recurring causes include excess pressure during molding, thermal stress during cooling, impact damage during handling. Recommended action: pause the affected line, inspect the nearby batch, and review process settings before continuing full-speed production. Prevention summary: reduce mechanical impact during transfer, calibrate temperature control, add automated inspection after cooling stage.
operations_alert:
Operations Alert:
Crack-related defects increased in the latest inspection batch.

Risk:
Critical or warning-level defects are concentrated on Line LINE-A1.

Most common likely cause:
excess pressure during molding, thermal stress during cooling, impact damage during handling.

Recommended immediate action:
inspect nearby batch items, remove this item from the production line, check molding pressure and cooling temperature.

Prevention:
reduce mechanical impact during transfer, calibrate temperature control, add automated inspection after cooling stage.
